data.title: "Please Bring It Back"--The Gen Z-Demanded 'Barrier-Saving Cleanser' by Dr.BRID C Just Dropped on Amazon
data.description: Launching on March 30, 2026 in New York and Seoul, South Korea, the highly awaited Soothing Jelly Cleanser debuts with a significant 40% discount. Embracing the "Defense Before Beauty" approach, it is accompanied by the popular Barrier Cream. Customers have eagerly awaited this release, with the discount serving as a major incentive.
Futures for the Nasdaq fall 0.6%, with S&P 500 futures down 0.4%.

data.title: Tims China Announces Q4 and Full Year 2025 Results Conference Call
data.description: Tims China, operator of Tim Hortons in China, will announce its Q4 and full year 2025 results on April 14, 2025, before market opening. The earnings release will be followed by a conference call at 8:00 AM EST or 8:00 PM China Standard Time. The call will be webcast and available on the company's website at https://ir.timschina.com/events-presentations/presentations-webcasts. Tims China's stock trades as Nasdaq: THCH.

data.title: Danilo Elez has been named Chief Executive Officer at Armstrong Fluid Technology.
data.description: In a recent report, it was stated that the number of confirmed cases of COVID-19 has surpassed 10 million globally, with over 500,000 deaths reported. The United States alone has seen over 2.5 million confirmed cases and more than 125,000 deaths. These numbers highlight the severity of the pandemic and the urgent need for continued efforts to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, various countries have implemented strict measures such as lockdowns and social distancing guidelines to prevent further transmission of the disease.Experts emphasize the importance of following these guidelines to protect public health and save lives.

data.title: Primaris REIT Announces AGM and Financial Results Release Date, Webcast, and Conference Call
data.description: In Toronto, Primaris Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: PMZ.UN) is set to disclose its financial performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, post-market close on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. Following this, on Thursday, April 30, 2026, the company will conduct its hybrid 2026 Annual General Meeting. Additionally, there will be a conference call and webcast presentation to review the quarterly financial and operational outcomes. The Hybrid Annual General Meeting is scheduled for Thursday, April 30.

data.title: Union of Kansai Governments: Kansai Deep Tech Ecosystem Gains Global Visibility
data.description: In Osaka, Japan, the Union of Kansai Governments has revitalized the Kansai Startup Ecosystem portal to bolster the region's global communication platform for startups and deep tech. Concurrently, the "DeepTech Frontier Kansai" website has been revamped to increase international exposure for Kansai's flourishing deep tech ecosystem. Recent years have seen consistent progress in Kansai's startup ecosystem, with its total value increasing from USD 2.68 billion.
Nikkei index in Japan drops 1.5% to reach 51,089.45.
